name: Continental Cheese Bake
recipeIngredient: 5 oz Soft Cheese, flavored with garlic and herbs
14 oz Can Artichoke Hearts, drained and halved
8 oz Pasta Bows, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 200°C/400°F/Gas Mark 6.
2. Heat butter and sauté garlic, pepper, and mushrooms, stirring frequently, until softened.
3. In a separate bowl, heat together soft cheese and fromage frais, stirring until combined.
4. Mix in artichoke hearts, ham, egg, cooked pasta, and mushroom mixture.
5. Transfer the mixture into a heatproof dish, sprinkle with breadcrumbs and grated cheese.
6. Bake for 20 minutes until the top is golden brown.
7. Garnish with parsley sprig to serve.
